requirement.description: Upon reception of body status information, the gateway shall immediately evaluate the status of all monitored doors.

test_cases.title: Verify GW evaluates door status when all doors are closed
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle ignition ON; BCM transmitting BCM_BodyStatus; CAN monitoring tool connected and configured for message IDs 0x6E and 0xC8.
steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_VehicleStatus message.
test_cases.postcondition: Ignition OFF; disconnect CAN monitoring tool.

test_cases.title: Verify GW evaluates door status when driver door is open
Verify GW evaluates door status when passenger door is open
Verify GW evaluates door status when both doors are open
Verify immediate evaluation on door status change
test_cases.expected_result: AnyDoorOpen changes from 0 to 1 immediately after BCM update.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_005_immediate_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GW_VEHICLE_STATUS, 3)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_any_door_open(m) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify GW clears door status immediately after doors close
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_006_immediate_clear(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GW_VEHICLE_STATUS, 3)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_any_door_open(m) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0
